ddls:
CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., core, premium, integration) */,
  "is_free" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the feature is available for free */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_tiers" (
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing tier */,
  "tier_name" TEXT /* Name of the pricing tier */,
  "tier_description" TEXT /* Description of the pricing tier */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the pricing tier */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the price (e.g., USD, EUR, etc.) */,
  "trial_period" INTEGER /* Trial period in days */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pricing tier was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pricing tier was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature availability record */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pricing tier */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the feature is available in the tier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature availability was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature availability was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_availability_tier_id FOREIGN KEY ("tier_id") REFERENCES pricing_tiers ("tier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_availability_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pricing tier the user is subscribed to */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date when the user subscribed */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_tier_id FOREIGN KEY ("tier_id") REFERENCES pricing_tiers ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "integration_name" TEXT /* Name of the third-party integration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the integration */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the integration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the integration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the integration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app version */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the mobile app */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform the app is available on (e.g., iOS, Android) */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the app */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the app version was released */,
  "download_url" TEXT /* Download URL for the app version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the app version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the app version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_settings" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the security setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "is_enabled_by_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the setting is enabled by default */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the security setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the security setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_security" (
  "user_security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user security setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security setting */,
  "is_enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the security setting is enabled for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user security setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user security setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_security_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_security_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES security_settings ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice is due */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the invoice */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the invoice (e.g., USD, EUR, etc.) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., paid, pending, overdue) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the invoice was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the invoice was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "payment_method_type" TEXT /* Type of payment method (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_method_data" TEXT /* Data for the payment method (e.g., credit card number, PayPal email) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
